title: aristida queenslandica var. queenslandica
intro: Aristida queenslandica var. queenslandica, also known as Queensland Blue Grass, is a native Australian grass species belonging to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Queensland Blue Grass include its ability to relieve coughs, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms associated with colds and flu. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a tea or infused in hot water to utilize its medicinal properties, and it can also be used in the form of a tincture or extract.
